_schema.description: Simulated humanitarian aid response times (days from crisis onset to first aid delivery) across three crisis types. Fictional placeholder — realistic distributional shapes derived from sector literature. Proves KDE renders before real data is substituted.

fields.label: string — crisis category name, used in legend and tooltip
fields.fill: string — hex color, mapped to hai palette roles (p2/p3/p5)
fields.strokeDash: string — SVG stroke-dasharray for redundant encoding. 'none' = solid
fields.values: array of numbers — observed response times in days. KDE is computed from these at runtime.

_schema.replace: Replace each values array with your raw observations. Bandwidth and referenceDay can be tuned in this file — the chart reads both at runtime.
